name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

(* Constants *)
N == 5  (* Number of processes *)

(* State definitions *)
idle == 0
trying == 1
critical == 2

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initialization *)
Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> idle]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N:
        \/ (* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
            /\ state[i] = idle
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = trying]
            /\ turn' = i
        \/ (* Process i enters critical section *)
            /\ state[i] = trying
            /\ turn = i
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = critical]
        \/ (* Process i exits critical section *)
            /\ state[i] = critical
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = idle]
        \/ (* No change *)
            /\ state' = state
            /\ turn' = turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Invariant: Mutual exclusion *)
MutualExclusion == 
    \A i, j \in 1..N: i /= j => ~(state[i] = critical /\ state[j] = critical)

(* Invariant: No deadlock *)
NoDeadlock == 
    \A i \in 1..N: state[i] /= trying => turn # i

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == << participants, coordinator >>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
       /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", decision |-> "None"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Prepare"]
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Prepare"
          /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
             /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].vote = "Yes"
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Commit", !.decision = "Commit"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].vote = "No"
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Abort", !.decision = "Abort"]
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "Commit"
          /\ coordinator.decision = "Commit"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Prepare"
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Commit"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Commit"
             /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "Abort"
        /\ coordinator.decision = "Abort"
        /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Prepare"
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Abort"]
        /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Abort"
           /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ coordinator \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}, decision : {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote : {"None", "Yes", "No"}]
          /\ vars \in [participants : [Participants -> [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote : {"None", "Yes", "No"}]], coordinator : [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}, decision : {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}]]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, None
VARIABLES forks, philosopher, state


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* Helper functions to get left and right fork indices
LeftFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> (p + 1) \mod N]

\* State variables
vars == <<state, forks>>

\* Each philosopher's state
state == [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]

\* Fork ownership: fork f is owned by philosopher p if forks[f] = p
forks == [f \in Forks |-> None]  \* None indicates fork is free

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> States]
          /\ forks \in [Forks -> {None} \cup Philosophers]

\* Helper predicates
\* Philosopher p is hungry if state[p] = "hungry"
Hungry(p) == state[p] = "hungry"

\* Philosopher p is eating if state[p] = "eating"
Eating(p) == state[p] = "eating"

\* Philosopher p can eat if both adjacent forks are free
CanEat(p) == forks[LeftFork[p]] = None /\ forks[RightFork[p]] = None

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, all forks are free
Init == /\ state = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> None]

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
HungryAction(p) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
                  /\ forks' = forks

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating (p must be hungry and forks must be free)
EatAction(p) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p,
                                         ![RightFork[p]] = p]

\* Action: philosopher p stops eating (p must be eating)
StopEatingAction(p) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
                      /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = None,
                                               ![RightFork[p]] = None]

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, or any hungry philosopher can start eating if forks are free, or any eating philosopher can stop eating
Next == \E p \in Philosophers :
          (HungryAction(p) \/ (Hungry(p) /\ CanEat(p) /\ EatAction(p)) \/ (Eating(p) /\ StopEatingAction(p)))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ num[i] = 0
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
             /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce item (set to 1)
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume item (set to 0)
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, candidate, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A candidate requests votes from all servers *)
RequestVote == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[1] + 1
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Follower"

(* A follower grants a vote if it hasn't voted yet and the candidate's term is at least as large *)
GrantVote == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[1]
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"

(* A candidate becomes a leader if it receives a majority of votes *)
BecomeLeader == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[1]
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = 1
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Leader"

Next == 
    \/ RequestVote
    \/ GrantVote
    \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE 
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), TRUE) 
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE 
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), FALSE) 
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE 
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE 
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState, Source, Target
VARIABLES ChannelState, MarkerSent, Recorded, State


vars == <<State, ChannelState, Recorded, MarkerSent>>

Init == /\ State = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState[p]]
        /\ ChannelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]
        /\ Recorded = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ MarkerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

Next == \E p \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
          /\ p \in Source(c) \/ p \in Target(c)
          /\ IF NOT Recorded[p] THEN
                /\ Recorded' = [Recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
                /\ State' = [State EXCEPT ![p] = State[p] + 1]  \* Record local state
                /\ MarkerSent' = [MarkerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]  \* Send marker on outgoing channel
                /\ ChannelState' = ChannelState
                /\ State' = State
          \ELSE
                /\ ChannelState' = [ChannelState EXCEPT ![c] = ChannelState[c] \cup {State[p]}]  \* Record channel state
                /\ State' = State
                /\ MarkerSent' = MarkerSent
                /\ Recorded' = Recorded

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ State \in [1..N -> InitState]
          /\ ChannelState \in [Channels -> InitChannelState]
          /\ Recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ MarkerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES token


vars == <<token>>

Init == token = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
          /\ Keys \in SUBSET Int
          /\ Values \in SUBSET Int

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, NULL, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, maxBallot, promisedBallot

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]

Prepare(p, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot + 1
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot'
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = proposers[p].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = proposers[p].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

            [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.promisedBallot = proposers[p].maxBallot']

    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = proposers[p].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = proposers[p].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = proposers[p].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

            [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.chosenBallot = proposers[p].maxBallot', !.chosenValue = v]

    /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
        IF acceptors[i].chosenBallot = proposers[p].maxBallot THEN v


Chosen(p, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = proposers[p].promisedBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = proposers[p].chosenBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = proposers[p].chosenValue
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
        IF acceptors[i].chosenBallot = proposers[p].maxBallot THEN v


Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        \/ Prepare(p, v)
        \/ Accept(p, v)
        \/ Chosen(p, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ chosen \in [1..N -> V \cup {NULL}]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, currentChunk, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state, timer


(* Helper definitions *)
NumChunks == Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
Chunk(i) == IF i <= NumChunks THEN

                    SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                    SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)

                <<>>  \* Empty chunk if index out of bounds

(* Initial state: file is a sequence of bytes, chunks are partitioned, no chunks sent or acknowledged, retransmit counts are zero, state is IDLE, timer is zero, no current chunk *)
Init == /\ file \in Seq(0..255)  \* File is a sequence of bytes (0..255)
        /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
        /\ chunks = [i \in 1..NumChunks |-> Chunk(i)]
        /\ sentChunks = {}
        /\ ackedChunks = {}
        /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..NumChunks |-> 0]
        /\ state = "IDLE"
        /\ timer = 0
        /\ currentChunk = 0

(* Action: send a chunk *)
SendChunk == /\ state = "IDLE"
            /\ currentChunk' = 1
            /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {1}
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
            /\ state' = "SENDING"
            /\ timer' = 0
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks>>

(* Action: receive an acknowledgment for a chunk *)
ReceiveAck == /\ state = "SENDING"
            /\ \E i \in 1..NumChunks : i \in sentChunks /\ i \notin ackedChunks
            /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
            /\ IF i = NumChunks THEN
                   state' = "DONE"

                   state' = "IDLE"
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, timer, currentChunk>>

(* Action: retransmit a chunk if timeout occurs *)
Retransmit == /\ state = "SENDING"
            /\ timer' = 0
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![currentChunk] = retransmitCount[currentChunk] + 1]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, state, currentChunk>>

(* Action: timeout occurs *)
Timeout == /\ state = "SENDING"
          /\ timer' = timer + 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks, state, currentChunk>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == SendChunk \/ ReceiveAck \/ Retransmit \/ Timeout

(* Invariant: retransmit count does not exceed MAX_RETRIES *)
TypeOK == /\ retransmitCount \in [1..NumChunks -> 0..MAX_RETRIES]
          /\ state \in {"IDLE", "SENDING", "DONE"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks, state, timer, currentChunk>>

====
